meaning: n.饲养,饲料,(动物或婴儿的)一餐vt.喂养,饲养,放牧,靠...为生vi.吃东西,流入
examples: Slugs and snails feed at night.
Can you feed the cat, please?
The printer has an automatic paper feed.
On warm days, Bostonians migrate to this popular park to sunbathe, picnic and feed waterfowl.
Eight greenways, like spokes in a wheel, will also feed into the Olympic Park itself.
